title: Whimscape Emissive
description: An emissive enhancement patch for Whimscape, adding glow effects to blocks, mobs, and more.
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebaea4a666870a12ac48b99df00193b6c8ccabd3.png)

This project is a visual enhancement add-on based on Whimscape, the original resource pack created by Kavast. It adds carefully crafted emissive textures to existing assets, giving blocks, mobs, and entities subtle glow details that enhance atmosphere and readability, especially in dark environments. The add-on is designed to remain faithful to Whimscape’s original art style and requires the base Whimscape pack to function properly, with support for OptiFine-based emissive rendering.

![EnderDragon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f3a667409ad7710afcd18f39ecee459a978100b_0.webp)
![Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ff1e57257d0fa1066f0fad5edad3ba748bfa292_0.webp)
